title: UNIX Network Programming, Volume 1: The Sockets Networking API (3rd Edition)
author: Richard W. Stevens, Bill Fenner, Andrew M. Rudoff, W. Richard Stevens
description: This revised guide to Unix networking APIs updates coverage of programming standards and debugging techniques, and covers operating systems including Red Hat 9, Solaris 9, HP-UX, Free BSD 4.8/5.0, AIX 5.x and Mac OS X.
